data.title: ANI Pharma (Nasdaq: ANIP) to reveal Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 7 at 8:30 a.m. ET in Princeton, NJ.
data.description: A pharmaceutical company based in Princeton, New Jersey, ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (ANI) revealed that they are scheduled to disclose their financial performance for the third quarter of 2025 on November 7, 2025. The information is set to be released before the market opens. ANI trades on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ANIP.

data.title: Havila Kystruten AS will have an extraordinary general meeting on Nov 7, 2025, at 10:00 AM CET.
data.description: The Board of Directors at Havila Kystruten AS has announced an extraordinary general meeting scheduled for Friday, November 7, 2025, at 10:00 CET.

data.title: Kontoor Brands increases quarterly dividend to $0.53 per share, up 2%. Payable on Dec 18, 2025, to shareholders as of Dec 8.
data.description: Greensboro, North Carolina - Kontoor Brands, Inc. (NYSE: KTB) has announced that its Board of Directors approved a 2 percent increase in the regular quarterly cash dividend for its common stock, bringing it to $0.53 per share. The cash dividend is set to be payable on December 18, 2025, to shareholders of record as of December 8, 2025. Kontoor Brands, Inc. (NYSE: KTB), a company with three renowned lifestyle, outdoor, and workwear brands under its portfolio.

data.title: Booz Allen Hamilton reports Q2 FY 2026 earnings in McLean, with ticker symbol $BAH.
data.description: In McLean, Virginia, Booz Allen Hamilton (NYSE: BAH) released preliminary figures for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026.

data.title: EBGLYSS shows durable disease control in atopic dermatitis; 80% saw skin improvement with half the doses. Data submitted to FDA.
data.description: Recent data on the extended use of EBGLYSS indicates that around 80% of patients experienced significant skin improvement, achieving or maintaining an EASI 75 rating. This was achieved with only half the usual doses required for monthly maintenance. Lilly has shared these findings with the FDA, potentially paving the way for a label update for EBGLYSS.
Avery Dennison announces quarterly dividend payout to shareholders.

data.title: Gorman-Rupp Co. (NYSE: GRC) raises quarterly cash dividend to $0.19 per share, a 2.7% increase from the previous quarter.
data.description: The Board of Directors of The Gorman-Rupp Company (NYSE: GRC) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share on the common shares, scheduled to be paid out on December 10, 2025. Shareholders as of November 14, 2025, will be eligible for this dividend. This dividend reflects a 2.7% increase compared to the previous quarter's $0.185 per share. This marks the 303rd consecutive quarterly dividend distributed by the company and the 53rd consecutive year of such payments.

data.title: Weekly recap of 11 finance press releases highlights Evernorth's IPO, financial literacy data, and Millennial retirement views.
data.description: A summary of key financial updates from PR Newswire this week includes Evernorth's announcement to go public, unveiling plans to offer shares on the stock market. Additionally, recent data sheds light on financial literacy, revealing insights on Millennials' perspectives on retirement planning. This information was disclosed in New York on Oct. 24, 2025. Stay informed with the latest developments in the financial world.

data.title: GrafTech reports growth in sales volume: 9% year-over-year for Q3, 2025, and 8% in first nine months. US sales volume grew 53% in Q3.
data.description: In Brooklyn Heights, Ohio, GrafTech International Ltd. (NYSE: EAF) has released its unaudited financial results for the third quarter and nine months ending on September 30, 2025. The company reported a 9% year-over-year growth in sales volume for the third quarter of 2025 and an 8% increase for the first nine months of the year. In the United States specifically, sales volume grew by an impressive 53% year-over-year for the third quarter of 2025 and 39% for the first nine months of the year. These results demonstrate significant growth and success for the company in the specified period.
